calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-02-2004 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-21-2003 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jan-12-04 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove Up In Scd 218
Off Calendar Oct-28-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Appearances:
Jay W. Smith, Esq. for Plaintiff National Commercial Services, Inc.
Plaintiff's witness, Mr. Goldstein also present, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendants John Cunin aka John Michael Cunin, New Vision Restaurant Partners, a California Limited Partnership dba The Cypress Club.
Principal of $93,703.72
Attorney's fees of $14,055.55
Costs of $424.50
Interest of $18,350.31
For the total of $126,534.08
Judgment signed in open court.
